title: Odisha MLAs arrive in Bhubaneswar for crucial biennial Rajya Sabha elections
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Odisha MLAs have arrived in Bhubaneswar.
*   Their arrival is in preparation for crucial Rajya Sabha elections.
*   These specific elections are held biennially (every two years).

title: It’s ironic welfare schemes implemented in T.N. are portrayed as fiscally irresponsible: Thangam Thennarasu
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Thangam Thennarasu contends that Tamil Nadu's welfare schemes are being unfairly portrayed as fiscally irresponsible.
*   He highlights the irony of this perception, implying a disconnect from their actual implementation or impact.
*   The statement serves as a defense of the state's welfare programs, challenging the narrative that they lack financial prudence.

title: Rajya Sabha elections LIVE: Voting begins for 5 seats in Bihar; Nitish Kumar, BJP chief Nitin Nabin in fray
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Voting has commenced for the Rajya Sabha elections.
*   The elections are being held for 5 seats in Bihar.
*   Prominent political figures, including Nitish Kumar and BJP chief Nitin Nabin, are in contention.

title: U.K. military bases given to U.S. to reduce impact of war on millions of Indians in Gulf, says U.K. Deputy High Commissioner
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The U.K. is transferring some of its military bases to the U.S.
*   This move is intended to lessen the impact of war on millions of Indians residing in the Gulf region.
*   The announcement was made by the U.K. Deputy High Commissioner.

title: DNT leaders move Supreme Court seeking distinct enumeration in 2027 Census
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Leaders of Denotified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic Tribes (DNT) have moved the Supreme Court.
*   They are seeking a distinct and separate enumeration (counting) for their communities.
*   This demand specifically applies to the upcoming 2027 Census.

title: Credit wars escalate in Kerala as polls approach
content:
Political parties in Kerala are locked in intense 'credit wars'.
*   They are fiercely competing to claim credit for government achievements and welfare schemes.
*   This escalation is primarily driven by the approaching elections in the state.

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: campaign window set at 38 days, same as in 2021
content:
The campaign window for the 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly election has been finalized.
*   This period will last for 38 days.
*   The duration is consistent with the campaign window set for the previous 2021 Assembly elections.

title: Deputy CM Bhatti invites Governor for Budget session
content:
Deputy CM Bhatti has extended an invitation to the Governor.
*   The invitation is specifically for the upcoming Budget session.
*   This signifies a formal step towards the commencement of the legislative session.

title: New FOB across railway track in Tiruvannamalai to be ready in April for public use
content:
A new Foot Over Bridge (FOB) is being constructed in Tiruvannamalai.
*   This bridge will span a railway track.
*   It is scheduled to be completed and open for public use in April.

title: LPG bookings fall to 77 lakh; Indian crude tanker sails out of UAE’s Fujairah safely
content:
LPG bookings have seen a decline.
*   The total number of LPG bookings now stands at 77 lakh.
*   An Indian crude tanker safely departed from Fujairah in the UAE.
